summary: Comprehensive testing of UI/UX Polish Phase features: Dashboard enhancements (gradient KPI cards, Recharts bar chart, FAB), Fascicolo Cantiere page, and Empty States. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%) - fatturato_mensile array and fascicolo endpoint verified. Frontend: All features working correctly - gradient cards visible, bar chart rendering, FAB expanding with 3 actions, empty states with SVG illustrations on all list pages.

gradient_kpi_cards.kpi-ferro: PASS - Blue gradient card with iron weight KPI
gradient_kpi_cards.kpi-cantieri: PASS - Amber gradient card with active sites count
gradient_kpi_cards.kpi-pos: PASS - Green gradient card with POS generated count
gradient_kpi_cards.kpi-fatturato: PASS - Violet gradient card with monthly revenue

dashboard_enhancements.recharts_bar_chart: PASS - 'Fatturato Mensile' chart renders SVG with 6 months of data

quick_action_fab.fab_actions: PASS - 3 quick actions expand on click (Rilievo, Preventivo, Cliente)

widgets.widget-materiale: PASS - Materiale da Ordinare widget visible

fascicolo_cantiere.document_grid: PASS - 5 gradient cards showing document counts (Rilievi, Distinte, Preventivi, Fatture, Cert. CE)
fascicolo_cantiere.timeline: PASS - Vertical timeline with chronological events
fascicolo_cantiere.timeline_events: PASS - Events show type badge, title, status, date, and extra info
fascicolo_cantiere.back_button: PASS - Indietro button navigates back to clients

empty_states.clients_page: PASS - SVG illustration + 'Crea il primo Cliente' button
empty_states.invoices_page: PASS - SVG illustration + 'Crea la prima Fattura' button
empty_states.rilievi_page: PASS - SVG illustration + 'Crea il primo Rilievo' button
empty_states.distinte_page: PASS - SVG illustration + 'Crea la prima Distinta' button
empty_states.preventivi_page: PASS - SVG illustration + 'Crea il primo Preventivo' button

features_verified.clients_page_fascicolo_button: PASS - FolderOpen icon button in actions column links to fascicolo page

GET /api/dashboard/stats.fatturato_mensile_structure: PASS - Each month has mese, mese_short, importo, documenti

GET /api/dashboard/fascicolo/:clientId.response_structure: PASS - Returns client, timeline, documents, and raw document lists

critical_code_review_comments: Recharts v3.6.0 integration is clean with custom tooltip and gradient bar fill
Empty states use inline SVG illustrations - nice touch for bundle size
QuickActionFAB animation uses CSS keyframes - smooth and performant
Fascicolo timeline is well structured with type-specific colors and icons
All new UI components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
test_credentials: Created temp test users via MongoDB (test-polish-*, test-empty-*), all cleaned up after tests
seed_data_creation: Test client with rilievo, distinta, preventivo, invoice, and certificazione for fascicolo testing - all cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX Polish Phase fully tested. Key features: 1) Dashboard has gradient KPI cards (4 colors), Recharts bar chart showing 6 months of revenue, and FAB with 3 quick actions (bottom-right). 2) Fascicolo Cantiere page at /fascicolo/:clientId shows vertical timeline and document grid for a client. 3) Empty states with SVG illustrations on Clients, Invoices, Rilievi, Distinte, and Preventivi pages. 4) Clients page has a new Fascicolo folder icon in actions column.
